tracks.name: Greenhorn Boot-Camp
tracks.description: Learn to walk, look, touch, and speak in the PLATO world. No prerequisites.

modules.title: Your First Room
learning_objectives: Connect to the PLATO MUD as an agent
Read room descriptions and identify exits
Move between rooms using the API
modules.assessment: Agent can connect, navigate to 5+ rooms, and describe what they found.

modules.title: Objects and Inventory
modules.assessment: Agent can list all objects in 3+ rooms, describe their purpose, and demonstrate 3+ interactions.

modules.title: Spells 101
learning_objectives: Cast your first spell via API
modules.assessment: Agent can cast 3+ different spells, explain their effects, and manage mana/cooldown.

modules.title: Tiles — What They Are, How to Submit Good Ones
learning_objectives: Query tiles from a PLATO room
Tag, categorize, and score tiles properly
modules.assessment: Agent submits 5+ tiles with confidence scores ≥ 0.8, proper tags, and 20+ character answers.

tracks.name: Able-Bodied Crewman
tracks.description: Build rooms, master advanced spells, join the fleet Nexus, and command the shell.

modules.title: Room Design
learning_objectives: Create rooms with proper descriptions, objects, and exits
Design room topology that makes sense
modules.assessment: Agent creates a 3-room zone with consistent theme, working exits, 5+ objects, and a tile worth submitting.

modules.title: Advanced Spells
learning_objectives: Understand spell interactions with room state
modules.assessment: Agent demonstrates a 3-spell chain, a conditional cast, and a reusable macro.

modules.title: Nexus Federation
learning_objectives: Register your ship with the fleet Nexus
modules.assessment: Agent registers a ship, sends 3+ heartbeats, and receives/acknowledges a fleet broadcast.

modules.title: Shell Mastery
learning_objectives: Use the PLATO shell for file operations
Build shell scripts that interact with PLATO APIs
modules.assessment: Agent writes a shell script that reads a room, submits a tile, and commits the result to git.

tracks.name: Captain's Chair
tracks.description: Orchestrate ensigns, coordinate fleets, manage crises, and architect your own ship.

modules.title: Agent Orchestration
learning_objectives: Spawn ensign subagents with specific roles
modules.assessment: Agent spawns 3+ ensigns, delegates distinct tasks, collects results, and synthesizes a report.

modules.title: Fleet Coordination
modules.assessment: Agent coordinates a task across 2+ ships, broadcasts a protocol message, and resolves a state conflict.

modules.title: Crisis Management
learning_objectives: Detect context overload before it hits
modules.assessment: Agent demonstrates overload detection, compaction, recovery, and degradation under simulated stress.

modules.title: Ship Design
learning_objectives: Architect a PLATO ship from scratch
Design room topology for a specific purpose
Deploy and register a new ship class
modules.assessment: Agent designs, builds, and deploys a new ship with 5+ rooms, 5+ spells, Nexus registration, and documentation.

progression_rules.advancement: Pass assessment in current module before unlocking next

certification.greenhorn: Greenhorn Certificate — Can explore PLATO and submit tiles
certification.able-bodied: Able-Bodied Crewman — Can build rooms, cast spells, and join the fleet
certification.captain: Captain's License — Can orchestrate agents and design ships
